name: Guest recovery script
description: Recovery script covering acknowledgement, ownership, immediate resolution, goodwill boundary, and follow-up so service failures are contained consistently.
source_ref: core-v2: recovery should combine warmth, ownership, and recurrence prevention
usage_moment: Use immediately after a service failure or complaint that requires active recovery and documented follow-up.
expected_output: A completed recovery action with named owner, resolution path, and follow-up or learning note.
